'''shazupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oatmeal|oatmeal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oatmeal|oatmeal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shazupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzipith|shæzipith]] || [[word:shæzipij|shæzipij]] || [[word:shæzipish|shæzipish]] || [[word:shæzipi|shæzipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazuzuputh|shazuzuputh]] || [[word:shazuzupuj|shazuzupuj]] || [[word:shazuzupush|shazuzupush]] || [[word:shazuzupu|shazuzupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazuputh|shazuputh]] || [[word:shazupuj|shazupuj]] || [[word:shazupush|shazupush]] || [[word:shazupu|shazupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazufpufth|shazufpufth]] || [[word:shazufpufj|shazufpufj]] || [[word:shazufpufsh|shazufpufsh]] || [[word:shazufpuf|shazufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazuputhu|shazuputhu]] || [[word:shazupuju|shazupuju]] || [[word:shazupushu|shazupushu]] || [[word:shazupuku|shazupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazuputh|shazuputh]] || [[word:shazupuj|shazupuj]] || [[word:shazupush|shazupush]] || [[word:shazupu|shazupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazuputhul|shazuputhul]] || [[word:shazupujul|shazupujul]] || [[word:shazupushul|shazupushul]] || [[word:shazupukul|shazupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazupuuthuthu|shazupuuthuthu]] || [[word:shazupuujuju|shazupuujuju]] || [[word:shazupuushushu|shazupuushushu]] || [[word:shazupuuku|shazupuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazuputhun|shazuputhun]] || [[word:shazupujun|shazupujun]] || [[word:shazupushun|shazupushun]] || [[word:shazupukun|shazupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazuputhuoro|shazuputhuoro]] || [[word:shazupujuoro|shazupujuoro]] || [[word:shazupushuoro|shazupushuoro]] || [[word:shazupukuoro|shazupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
